sectiondef.header: The Table Identifiers within a bank for each Register type

briefdescription.para: Default Table Identifier within the Bank.

sectiondef.header: These are not addresses. They identify the type of register to be
Bit positions for User Control command options within the byte field
State is stored in bits 2:0, Mask = 111 = 0x7

briefdescription.para: Reconfigurable Module Unload State Of VSM.
Reconfigurable Module Load State Of VSM.

sectiondef.header: Errors are stored in bits 6:3, Mask = 1111000 = 0x78

description.para: This is the largest ID possible.
The bits used are will be sized in hardware to match the number of triggers actually allocated.

briefdescription.para: Hardware Shutdown and then Software Shutdown Required.
Software Shutdown and then Hardware Shutdown Required.
This macro writes a value to a PRC register.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register to write to.
is the data written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XPRC_WriteReg(u32 Address, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This macro reads a value from a PRC register.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register to read from.
